info.description: API Gateway for the Kazakhstan carsharing platform. Handles auth, users, fleet, zones, insurance, and maintenance.
info.title: Car Rental API Gateway

post.description: Authenticates a user by email or phone + password. Returns an access token and sets an HttpOnly refresh token cookie.
Invalidates the refresh token and clears the cookie.
Issues a new access token using the refresh token stored in the HttpOnly cookie.
Creates a new user account. Returns the new user's ID.

get.description: Returns insurance records filtered by car, type, status, or expiry window.

parameters.description: Return policies expiring within N days
parameters.name: expiringWithinDays

post.description: Records an ОСАГО or КАСКО policy for a specific car.

get.summary: Get pre-signed upload URL for insurance document images

get.description: Returns work orders for cars. Filter by car, template, or status (pending, in_progress, completed).

post.description: Marks a maintenance record as completed, resets the service interval clock, and transitions the car back to available.

get.summary: Get pre-signed upload URL for maintenance receipts

post.description: Defines a recurring service interval (e.g. oil change every 8,000 km / 180 days).

get.description: Returns a filtered, paginated list of car models.

post.description: Registers a new car model (e.g. Hyundai Solaris 2022). Returns the new model's UUID.

get.description: Returns a pre-signed S3-compatible URL and object key for uploading a car model image.
Returns cars filtered by status, location radius, fuel level, zone, and model attributes. Pass latitude+longitude+radiusM to get nearby cars sorted by distance.

post.description: Creates a new physical car record linked to a car model and telematics device.
post.summary: Register a car in the fleet

get.description: Returns time-series fuel readings for a car. Useful for detecting theft (sudden drops) or verifying refuels.
Returns a pre-signed S3-compatible URL and object key for uploading a car or trip photo.
get.summary: Get pre-signed image upload URL for car photos

get.description: Returns the immutable audit trail of every car state transition (available → reserved → in_trip → …).

post.description: Admin endpoint to create a user with explicit roles and activation state.

delete.description: Deletes a user matched by id or email query param.

patch.description: Partially updates a user matched by id or email query param.

post.description: Verifies the activation code submitted by the user.
Sends an SMS/email activation code to the current user.

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated user extracted from the JWT.
Returns zones filtered by type and active status.

post.description: Creates a geographic zone polygon (operating area, no-drop, parking hub, or surcharge zone).

parameters.description: Zone payload (boundary as GeoJSON polygon string)
parameters.name: body
